utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , we have to talk . I am just getting out of a very serious relationship

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am just getting out of a very serious relationship

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: I know ! And I am just getting out of a marriage , I mean talk about meant to be !

emotion_cause.span: 2_And I am just getting out of a marriage , I mean talk about meant to be !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Right ! But I just think that this is happening too soon .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I just think that this is happening too soon .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , too soon , too schmoon . Face it honey , I am not letting you get away this time .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am not letting you get away this time .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I hear you . But ! Unfortunately , my company is transferring me overseas !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh no ! Where to ? To Paris ?

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: To London ? No ... no , Rome ? Vienna ? Ooh ... ooh , Barcelona ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_To London ? No ... no , Rome ? Vienna ? Ooh ... ooh , Barcelona ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , could you just stop talking for a second ? Yemen . That is right , yes , I am being transferred to Yemen !

emotion_cause.span: 9_could you just stop talking for a second ?

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Ugh , well I will just have to soak up every once of Chandler Bing until that moment comes .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But I do know that it is some time tomorrow .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I will just have to soak up every once of Chandler Bing until that moment comes .
